company.name: Lumora
company.description: Lumora is a B2B SaaS that helps retail chains forecast inventory with AI. 40-person team, Series A, based in Paris. Current top priority: shipping the 'Atlas' release on July 15 for our two biggest enterprise clients.
company.product: A web platform that ingests sales and logistics data, runs demand forecasting models, and gives store managers daily restocking recommendations. The Atlas release adds multi-warehouse support — it is the deadline everyone is working toward.
